subject: Your EHR integration is leaking patient data — here's the proof
body:
Hi [Name],

Ran a quick scan of your API endpoints last week. Found 3 unencrypted data transfer points between your EHR and billing module — the kind that triggers HIPAA audit flags.

43% of healthcare data breaches in 2024 started from internal integration gaps, not external attacks.

[Product] wraps your existing stack with end-to-end encryption and audit logging in 48 hours — no rearchitecting needed.

Want the full security report? I can send it over today.
why_it_works: technical icebreaker with specific finding + compliance fear + no-rework offer
